8:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Background worker running consolidation cycles. Compresses, promotes, extracts, and evicts entries according to retention policies."}]
a:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Index Manager"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Maintains all database indices: vector embeddings (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],"), FTS5 full-text, and temporal graph relationships."]}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Technology Stack"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"| Layer | Technology | Purpose |\n|-------|-----------|---------|\n| Database | SQLite 3.45+ | Primary storage |\n| Vectors | sqlite-vec | Vector similarity search |\n| Text | FTS5 | Full-text search |\n| Embeddings | OpenAI / SentenceTransformers | Text-to-vector |\n| ORM | SQLAlchemy | Schema management |\n| API | FastAPI | REST endpoints |"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Scaling Considerations"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is designed for single-node deployments:"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],": In-memory LRU with SQLite backing"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],": SQLite with vector extension"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],": Native graph in SQLite"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-agent deployments, each agent maintains its own database instance. Shared memory is achieved via explicit synchronization, not concurrent database access."}]
12:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L22",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Not a Distributed System"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not support distributed or clustered deployments. For high-availability requirements, use SQLite replication (Litestream) or export/import between instances."}]}]]}]]}]}]
